headline: Gilead Sciences (GILD) Falls More Steeply Than Broader Market: What Investors Need to Know
summary: In the closing of the recent trading day, Gilead Sciences (GILD) stood at $141.29, denoting a -2.15% move from the preceding trading day.

headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid GILD and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Since March 2021, the S&P 500 has delivered a total return of 70.9%. But one standout stock has nearly doubled the market - over the past five years, Gilead Sciences has surged 127% to $145.23 per share. Its momentum hasn’t stopped as it’s also gained 27.8% in the last six months, beating the S&P by 26.8%.
